name: Brian Lee

contactInfo.office: 100 W. 1st St., Suite 301, Mount Pleasant, TX 75455

bio: Brian Lee serves as the Titus County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Titus County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Mount Pleasant area.
campaignPromises: Keep Titus County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
